arts.ttl: 'I quit Man Utd for Tottenham despite contract offer – this is why I moved on'
arts.sum: Teddy Sheringham once revealed his reasoning for leaving Manchester United to clinch a return to Tottenham Hotspur despite being handed a new contract by the Red Devils

arts.ttl: Seven players could miss Manchester United vs Tottenham Premier League clash
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as both the Reds and Spurs will be forced to have several players on the sideline for the Premier League fixture due to injury

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag admits he must 'respect criticism' from 'some pundits' after his war of words with 'crazy' Jamie Redknapp... who suggested the Man United boss dropped Marcus Rashford for disciplinary reasons
arts.sum: The Dutchman was recently embroiled in a war of words with Jamie Redknapp , who he branded 'crazy' over 'speculation' as to why he dropped Marcus Rashford against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson struggled not to laugh when asked about Tottenham's title chances
arts.sum: Manchester United icon Sir Alex Ferguson once claimed that Tottenham Hotspur will never win the Premier League - and that his former team are more likely to despite their 12-year drought

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag running out of time as Man Utd manager eyes repeat of statement win
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag looked like an exciting appointment when his Manchester United beat Tottenham in October 2022, but the jury is still out on the Dutchman's long-term suitability

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has answered bold Ange Postecoglou prediction amid nightmare Tottenham scenario - Kieran Horn
arts.sum: Tottenham are among the favourites to win Europe's second club competition, however their Carabao Cup journey could end very soon. "The next round, I announce you, I play the second team," he said after a 2-1 win against Watford.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou explains what Lucas Bergvall did in Tottenham training and why Son needs rest
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou believes that Son Heung-min's game time this season for Tottenham is not sustainable and that Lucas Bergvall responded perfectly on Friday to his Europa League disappointment. "No, I’d rather I leave him out and he’s disappointed with me because I think that’s what you want in him, and sometimes it’s doing something for someone’s own good and that’s my decision, my responsibility and I’ve got to take that on board."

arts.ttl: Man United injury update: What's the latest on wonderkid Leny Yoro?
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag says that Leny Yoro "is doing very well", with the centre-back expected to be back on the field before the end of the year.
